portal_description: ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) is a set of criteria for evaluating companies' activities in the areas of ecology, social responsibility, and corporate governance.
esg_mainPage_parag: Uniting education, research and KBTU initiatives on the sustainable development agenda
esg_mainPage_parag2: Everything you need to know about environmental, social and governance aspects (ESG)
esg_mainPage_parag3: ESG is a conscious choice for a sustainable future.
esg_mainPage_parag5: ESG is more than principles. It is a path leading to a sustainable future.
esg_mainPage_parag6: Every decision we make affects the planet, society and business.
esg_mainPage_parag7: ESG is the key to creating a fair and sustainable world for future generations.
esg_mainPage_banner: ESG IS NOT JUST A TREND, IT'S AN ACTION

esg_intro: ESG — the foundation of sustainable development.
esg_ready: Are you ready to build a better world with ESG?
knowledge_text: The cross-disciplinary ESG Competence Center at KBTU is an innovative educational and research platform focused on integrating modern approaches in sustainable development.
community_text: Creating a community of students, faculty, and experts united by the values of sustainable development.
networking_text: Building connections with companies, funds, accelerators and investors in the ESG environment.
practice_text: Solving cases from industrial enterprises, SMEs and subsoil users.
grants_text: Implementing ideas through grant support and ESG hackathons.
vision_text: ESG is the key to creating a fair and sustainable world for future generations.

footer_desc: Sustainable development platform of the Kazakh-British Technical University.
mission_text: To integrate ESG principles into education, research and the university environment, shaping a new generation of sustainable development leaders.
vision_campus_text: To be the leading university in ESG and sustainable development, combining strong education, research and responsible governance.
esg_hero_quote: The KBTU ESG Competence Center helps businesses, financial organizations and universities implement modern ESG practices through training, consulting and sustainable development strategy.
esg_gri_text1: KBTU ESG Center is an official certified training partner of Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) in the Asia-Pacific region.
esg_gri_text2: The university offers a certified course Reporting with the GRI Standards as part of the official GRI Certified Sustainability Professional program.

esg_service3_desc: Systematic integration of ESG into corporate practice and management.
